steps.action: POST /api/mcp with valid initialize JSON-RPC 2.0 body
steps.expected: HTTP 200 with Mcp-Session-Id header and result fields
steps.observed: HTTP 200, Mcp-Session-Id header present, valid result fields

assertions.title: Subsequent Request Accepted With Session ID

steps.action: POST /api/mcp with tools/list body and Mcp-Session-Id header

steps.expected: HTTP 404 or body with error field
steps.observed: HTTP 400 with BadRequestException and error field

assertions.title: tools/list Returns search_documentation With Correct inputSchema

steps.expected: search_documentation tool present with correct schema
steps.observed: search_documentation present, schema contains query, space, version as required strings

assertions.title: search_documentation Missing Required Args Returns MCP Error

steps.observed: HTTP 200 with result.content item having isError: true
HTTP 200 with result.content item having isError: true
HTTP 200 with result.content item having isError: true

frictions.description: Server responded with 406 Not Acceptable unless Accept: application/json, text/event-stream header was provided
frictions.resolution: Added Accept header to test script

frictions.description: Using PowerShell with curl.exe resulted in quoting issues for the JSON body payload
frictions.resolution: Created a custom Node.js script reading payload from files
